name: TestSetEcuOffline
title: TestSetEcuOffline
description: Disconnects the ECU from the bus. Messages being sent by the ECU will not be forwarded to the bus.With the testSetEcuOnline function the ECU can be reconnected to the bus.
This function interferes with the CAPL program and possible Nodelayer DLLs.

parameters.name: aNode
parameters.description: ECU to be switched offline (must be defined in the database).
